best_for: Comparing categories or discrete values (max 8-10 bars)
color_strategy: Use primary palette with muted secondary fills; highlight one bar with CTA color
animation: Staggered entrance from bottom with 50ms delay per bar
anti_patterns: Using 3D effects or too many colors; not sorting bars by value
accessibility: Include aria-label on each bar; provide data table fallback
implementation_tip: Use horizontal bars when labels are long; always start y-axis at 0

best_for: Side-by-side comparison of 2-3 categories across groups
color_strategy: Use primary/secondary/accent from palette; ensure distinguishable without color
animation: Groups fade in sequentially left to right
anti_patterns: Comparing more than 3 series per group; inconsistent bar widths
accessibility: Use patterns/textures alongside color for color-blind users
implementation_tip: Limit to 2-3 series; add direct labels instead of relying on legend

color_strategy: Sequential shades of single hue from light to dark
animation: Stack builds up from bottom per bar
anti_patterns: Using too many stack segments (max 4-5); misleading proportions
accessibility: Provide percentage tooltips; include data table

best_for: Trends over time or continuous data (max 3-4 lines)
color_strategy: Single accent color with light fill area beneath; use dashes for secondary lines
animation: Draw-on animation left to right with 800ms duration
anti_patterns: Plotting too many lines without legend clarity; dual y-axes
accessibility: Announce trend direction to screen readers; provide data points
implementation_tip: Use monotone curve type for smooth lines; add reference lines for targets

best_for: Volume or magnitude over time showing cumulative effect
color_strategy: Gradient fill from primary at 0.3 opacity to transparent; single area preferred
animation: Fade-in from baseline with smooth wipe
anti_patterns: Stacking too many areas making bottom layers unreadable; opaque fills
accessibility: Provide data table; describe trend in aria-label
implementation_tip: Use single area charts; if stacking limit to 3 with high transparency

best_for: Part-to-whole relationships (max 5 segments) with center stat
color_strategy: Sequential shades of primary color; highlight largest segment
animation: Spin-in with counter animation in center showing total/key metric
anti_patterns: Using pie charts with more than 5 segments; 3D pie charts; exploded segments
accessibility: Include percentage labels on each segment; provide text alternative
implementation_tip: Always show a center label (total/title); order segments largest to smallest

best_for: Inline trend indicator within tables or KPI cards
color_strategy: Single color matching the KPI context (green for growth / red for decline)
anti_patterns: Making sparklines too large (they're meant to be inline); adding axes
accessibility: Include aria-label describing the trend direction
implementation_tip: Keep height 20-40px; no labels/axes/gridlines; pair with numeric value

best_for: Single metric with trend indicator and comparison
color_strategy: Primary for positive trend; error color for negative; muted for neutral
animation: Count-up number animation with 600ms duration; trend arrow slide-in
anti_patterns: Showing raw numbers without context or comparison; too many decimal places
accessibility: Use aria-live region for real-time KPI updates
implementation_tip: Always show comparison (vs last period / vs target); include trend arrow and percentage

best_for: Density or correlation matrices; calendar activity; geographic data
color_strategy: Sequential single-hue gradient (light to dark); avoid rainbow scales
animation: Cell-by-cell fade-in with 20ms delay; hover highlights row and column
anti_patterns: Using diverging color scales for non-diverging data; rainbow gradients
accessibility: Provide tooltip with exact value; include legend scale
implementation_tip: Use 5-7 color steps; always include a legend; add row/column headers

best_for: Correlation between two variables; outlier detection
color_strategy: Categorical colors for groups; size encoding for third variable; muted grid
animation: Points fade in with slight random delay for organic feel
anti_patterns: Overcrowding points without opacity; missing axis labels; no trend line
accessibility: Include trend description in accessible text; tooltip per point
implementation_tip: Use opacity 0.6 for overlapping points; add trend line; consider log scale for skewed data

color_strategy: Semi-transparent fill with solid border per item; use primary/secondary
animation: Shape draws in from center with 600ms ease-out
anti_patterns: Comparing more than 3 items; using more than 8 axes; no labels
accessibility: Not recommended for screen readers — always provide data table alternative
implementation_tip: Normalize all axes to same scale; provide clear axis labels

color_strategy: Sequential shades within each parent category; distinct hues between parents
animation: Rectangles grow from center with staggered delay
anti_patterns: Too many small rectangles; text that doesn't fit; poor color distinction
accessibility: Provide hierarchical data table; breadcrumb navigation for drill-down
implementation_tip: Minimum rectangle size for readability; show labels only if they fit; enable drill-down

best_for: Conversion pipeline or sequential drop-off stages
color_strategy: Gradient from primary (top) to muted (bottom); highlight drop-off stages
animation: Stages slide in from left sequentially with percentage counter
anti_patterns: More than 7 stages; not showing drop-off percentages; 3D funnels
accessibility: Label each stage with name and value; provide text summary
implementation_tip: Always show conversion rate between stages; highlight biggest drop-off

best_for: Single value against a target or range (KPIs/scores)
color_strategy: Green/yellow/red zones or primary color fill against muted track
animation: Needle sweep or fill animation from 0 to value with overshoot ease
anti_patterns: Using full 360-degree gauges; too many on one page; tiny labels
accessibility: Use aria-valuenow/min/max attributes; include text value
implementation_tip: Use 180-degree half gauge; show numeric value prominently; max 3-4 per dashboard row

best_for: Flow relationships between categories; budget allocation; user journey
color_strategy: Source category colors flowing with gradient into target colors
anti_patterns: Too many nodes making it unreadable; crossed links; no labels
accessibility: Complex — always provide simplified table or summary
implementation_tip: Limit to 15-20 nodes max; highlight paths on hover; show flow values

best_for: Chronological events or milestones; project schedules; history
color_strategy: Alternating primary/secondary for events; accent for key milestones
animation: Events fade in as user scrolls; connection line draws between points
anti_patterns: Overcrowding events; inconsistent time scale; missing dates
accessibility: Use semantic time elements; linear reading order
implementation_tip: Group events by period; allow zoom for dense timelines; highlight current position
